content.en:
The trade fairs that the Xuandao Order can enter are not always available, they can only be entered once every 100 million eternal years, and each time it lasts for a short time.

After all, many Arctic creatures are very busy, and even if they need to trade items, they do it quickly, so it doesn't take too long.

If it is traded for a long time, the value of the Xuandao Order is not very large.

At this time, it was not long before the time for the trade fair to open, and there were only about ten million eternal years left, and it was also because of this that the Lord of the Ice Phoenix gave Ye Tian a Xuan Dao order, allowing him to enter the trade fair and be qualified to contact a higher level of powerhouses.

The most important thing is to trade the items you need and quickly improve your strength.

Of course, if you want to get enough treasures, you also need to pay chips.

The transaction currency of the Extreme Deep Sea is the Extreme Coin, which is used here as a normal currency.

The rules of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea are very special, and the Extreme Dao Ratio can be condensed here, just like the Extreme Dao Mountain of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, in fact, the Space-Time Ancestral Realm is a special world created by imitating the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

Therefore, the Extreme Deep Sea can condense the Extreme Dao coin.

Of course, the speed of condensing Extreme Dao Coins in the Extreme Deep Sea will be very slow, and Extreme Dao creatures almost have no will clones, and if they keep condensing Extreme Dao Coins, they will waste a long time.

For many Extreme Dao creatures, it is better to find the Extreme Dao Treasure than to condense the Extreme Dao Coin, and perhaps the value of the treasure found is far greater than the Extreme Dao Coins that have been condensed over time.

Therefore, there are very few Extreme creatures who are willing to spend time condensing Extreme Dao Coins, and they are not willing to waste time.

Therefore, the value of Jidao Coin is still very high.

However, like the Extreme Dao Coin of the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, the Extreme Dao Coin cannot be brought into the end of the realm, and once it is brought in, the Extreme Dao Coin will decompose into the power of the Extreme Dao and turn into nothingness.

"It's too slow to condense Pole Dao Coins, but Extreme Dao Deep Sea has a way to quickly condense Pole Dao Coins. "

Ye Tian muttered.

This is what he learned in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, after all, the method of condensing the Extreme Dao Coin was transmitted from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea from the beginning, and the means of condensing the Extreme Dao Coin in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm was the simplest means.

Under normal circumstances, a super-perfect controller condenses the Extreme Dao Coins, which is a kind of condensation, even if he has mastered several Extreme Dao Coins, he can only condense one Extreme Dao Coins.

However, Ye Tian learned in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea that there was a secret technique that could condense a variety of Extreme Dao coins at the same time.

For example, if an Extreme Dao creature has mastered five Extreme Dao Coins, then he can condense the five Extreme Dao Coins at the same time, each of which can still only condense one, but condense five Extreme Dao Coins at one time, this value is high!

And Ye Tian has mastered thousands of Extreme Dao Coins, if he masters this secret technique, he can condense thousands of Extreme Dao Coins at one time.

It is conceivable that it doesn't take too long for him to get a large number of Extreme Dao Coins.

"You have to get this kind of secret technique! Although this kind of secret technique is very awesome, many Extreme Dao creatures have only mastered one or several Extreme Dao Coins, so the value of this secret technique is not too outrageous, but it is also very precious!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Where can I get this secret technique?

Ye Tian thought about it, and it seemed that he could only turn to the Lord of the Ice Phoenix for help.

He saved the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, so the other party should be able to give face.

So, Ye Tian contacted the Lord of the Ice Phoenix and informed the Lord of the Ice Phoenix about his need to condense the method of the Extreme Dao Coin.

I thought that this matter would be difficult, but the Lord of the Ice Phoenix himself sent someone to bring him this secret art.

It didn't take long for this secret technique to fall into Ye Tian's hands.

"I didn't expect to get this secret art so easily!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Perhaps for the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, this secret technique did not give Ye Tian any loss, so he gave it directly.

Soon, Ye Tian completely accepted this Extreme Dao Secret Technique.

"Control the way!"

This is the name of this Extreme Path Secret Art.

And if you want to cultivate this secret art, you can't just cultivate, you also need to use a treasure-the Divine Control Stone, you must use this resource to practice the Dao Control Technique, otherwise the Dao Control Secret Technique is useless.

The value of the Divine Control Stone is extremely high, but fortunately, Ye Tian is not too poor, in these years, he has also found some resources, if all of them are sold, he should be able to buy a few Divine Controlling Stones, so that he can practice the secret art of controlling the Dao.

Next, Ye Tian exhausted his resources and finally exchanged for three Divine Control Stones, and then began to cultivate the Dao Control Dao.

The first god control stone was not allowed to be practiced by Ye Tian, so it was wasted, but after the second god control stone was refined, Ye Tian finally practiced it.

With only two Divine Control Stones, he successfully practiced the Secret Technique of Controlling the Dao, which was already very demonic, and according to his understanding, many Extreme Dao creatures spent dozens of Divine Control Stones to barely practice the Controlling Dao.

After practicing the Extreme Dao Control Dao, Ye Tian could control the many Extreme Dao Paths in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and run the Extreme Dao Secret Technique to condense the Extreme Dao Coins.

"Let's start, according to my condensation speed, and condense thousands of Extreme Dao Coins at the same time, when the trade begins, I should be able to condense a lot of Extreme Dao Coins, and I can buy those precious resources!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following days, Ye Tian condensed the Extreme Dao Coins in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

Time flies.

Before you know it, ten million eternal years have passed.

It takes five times as long to condense an Extreme Dao Coin in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea as it does in the Extreme Dao Mountain, and it takes 500,000 Eternal Years to condense the Extreme Dao Coin in the Extreme Dao Coin, while Ye Tian can condense thousands of Extreme Dao Coins at one time.

Today, Ye Tian has condensed more than 60,000 Extreme Dao coins.

"More than 60,000 Extreme Dao Coins are already a lot, enough to buy a lot of treasures. Ye Tian muttered.

Another period of time has passed, and the fair is finally about to begin.

this day.

The trade fair began, and Ye Tian's Xuandao Order exuded special fluctuations.

At this time, Ye Tian opened the Xuandao Order, and his body followed the Xuandao Order, instantly entering a special space-time area.

This is the address of the trade fair.

......

Xuandao Trading Area.

One Extreme Dao creature descended here, most of them were Perfect Controllers of the Three Realms, and there were very few Extreme Dao creatures at the level of Super Perfect Controllers, and Ye Tian was one of them.

There are many trading shops in the Xuandao trading area, and every Extreme Path creature can enter it, display their treasures and mark the price, and which Extreme Path creature is interested in can go to trade.

At this moment, Ye Tian shuttled through this trading area, carefully perceiving the copying talent, hoping to find a treasure that would allow the copying talent to be promoted, or if there was a treasure suitable for him, he would also buy it.

Abrupt.

A wave of attraction came and attracted the talent for copying.

At this moment, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

"That's right, I didn't expect that there really is an extreme treasure here that allows me to copy my talent for promotion!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
